The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

D:\\vue-ws\\my-serverless-app\\serverles.serviceRawFile:
service: python-lambda-dynamodb

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.12
  region: ap-south-1
  stage: dev
  environment:
    DYNAMODB_TABLE: MyItemsTable
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:ap-south-1:426744279061:table/MyItemsTable


functions:
  api:
    handler: handler.main
    events:
      - http:
          path: items
          method: get
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: items
          method: post
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: items
          method: options
          cors: true

resources:
  Resources:
    MyItemsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: MyItemsTable
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: id
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: id
            KeyType: HASH
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        
plugins:
  - serverless-s3-sync

custom:
  s3Sync:
    - bucketName: my-serverless-dynamodb   # replace with your actual bucket name
      localDir: dist              # Vue build output folder
